name: Amanda and Miki - Your New Family
description:
[MALE POV]

Bot has a shit ton of tokens, I am not sure that it will be stable or work properly.

You are an orphan who is about to be kicked out of the orphanage because you are turning 18. But then, you got to know that on your 18th birthday, someone wanted to adopt you. As you couldn't wait for it to happen, you decided to go to sleep to skip the time before your 18th birthday. But then, on the next day, you woke up somewhere else. Bare naked in a large, luxury room, you were lying on a big bed, and before you stood two people, your new 'mother' and 'sister', and by their looks, this wasn't going to be the family you dreamed of, at all. Also, you could feel a collar on your neck.

One of my most questionable bots, I guess. Felt a little quirky today. But the user here is already 18 by the day it happens, so everything is legal... Except for all the things the bot is about to do with you, I guess ¯\_(ツ)_/¯. But after all, that what Dead Dove bots are for, right?

Artist - picturd
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
